SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Continued To Feb-14-03 At 04:00 P.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: 4:15PM
Judge Diane Wick, dept. 611, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-susan crozier: c/c for hearing related to the appointment of a real estate referee; Mr. John Chew appears for the plaintiff, Ms. Alice Ng appears in pro per. Both parties inform the court that more time is required to resolve issue re the property in question. Judge Wick continues the matter to 2/14/03, 4:00PM.
4:40PM
No further matters for the record, court adjourns.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Continued To Feb-03-03 At 04:15 P.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber, reporter-Floyd Butler, 11:02AM:
c/c for court trial, Mr. John Chew appears for plaintiff, Alice Ng appears as defedant in Pro Per. The Court determines that Ms. Ng is trustee for the disputed estate. Plaintiff waives opening statements but previously submitted a trial brief, Ms. Ng gives a brief opening statement. The court determines that there are two outstanding liens against the defendant's estate in the amounts of $800,000 and $200,000 respectively and Ms. Ng concurred with that figure. Mr. Chew states that Continental Savings had offered to settle the case for $75,000.00 but Ms. Ng was not able to pay that amount and the offer expires 12/31/02.
11:17AM
After discussing the issue with both parties they decide to agree to submit the matter to a referee, Courtney Wing. The Court further asks that Mr. Chew ask Mr. Wing to submit a report to the Court that would include the approximate amounts that might be incurred by Ms. Ng by agreeing to the services of a referee and include a basic plan. This report is due by 1/15/03. Further the Court requests a status report from Mr. Wing due to the Court by 1/30/03. The Court then sets a new hearing date of 2/3/03, 4:15PM, for a further hearing. The Court then asks both parties, in the intersts of reducing costs to Ms. Ng, to discuss whether Mr. Wing needs to appear on 2/3/03 or not. Ms. Ng is to notify Mr. Chew whether Mr. Wing needs to appear or not.
11:30AM
Court adjourns
11:34AM
Ms. Ng appears in Court ex parte. After a brief discussion Judge Wick points out that because the other party is not present the Court can not engage in any discussions with her.
